ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Shortened name or nickname of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the athlete */,
  "birth_country" TEXT /* Country of birth of the athlete */,
  "residence_place" TEXT /* Current place of residence of the athlete */,
  "residence_country" TEXT /* Current country of residence of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete (in meters/feet) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "weight_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weight unit */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the athlete's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the athlete's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_weight_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_unit_id") REFERENCES weight_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport discipline */,
  "discipline_code" TEXT /* Code representing the sport discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport discipline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sport discipline was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sport discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code representing the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_sports" (
  "athlete_sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete-sport link */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport discipline */,
  "primary_sport" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sport is the athlete's primary discipline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the athlete-sport link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the athlete-sport link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_sports_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_sports_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event participation record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result achieved by the athlete in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Olympic Games, World Championships) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event participation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event participation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_events_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, athlete) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "height_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each height unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the height unit (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the height unit (e.g., m, ft) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the height unit was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the height unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_heights" (
  "height_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the height record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "height_value" REAL /* Height value of the athlete */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the height unit */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the height was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the height record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the height record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_heights_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES height_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_heights_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the coach's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the coach's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight unit (e.g., kilograms, pounds) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the weight unit (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weight unit was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the weight unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
